title: TAILI Suction Soap Dish for Shower, Max Hold 3 KG Shower Soap Holder for Bathroom, Wall Mounted Sponge Tray, Drill-Free, Removable Bathtub Organizer, Stainless Steel Sink Holder Suction Cup, Chrome
features: ONE-SECOND, DAMAGE-FREE INSTALLATION: Install this stainless steel soap dish in literally one second—no drilling, screws, glue, or tools needed. Simply clean a smooth surface, remove the protective cover, and press firmly on the “PUSH” panel until you hear the satisfying “PUFF” click. Effortless even for a child, this suction soap dish for shower leaves no marks and requires no permanent fixtures

PATENTED SUPER-SUCTION & METAL DURABILITY: Featuring a patented octopus-tentacle inspired TPE suction cup and a sleek chrome soap dish body, this metal soap holder shower offers unmatched holding power (up to 5 kg / 11 lbs) and long-term corrosion resistance. Waterproof, oil-proof, and rust-proof, it includes a rear support bracket for added security, ensuring your soap dishes for bathroom stay firmly in place for years

SELF-DRAINING & EASY TO CLEAN: Designed with integrated drainage holes, this stainless steel soap dish prevents water pooling to keep soap dry and extend its lifespan. The removable suction tray lifts out easily from its frame for quick rinsing, making cleaning this soap dishes for bathroom simple and hassle-free

SLEEK, SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: With smooth rounded edges and a contemporary chrome soap dish finish, this compact organizer looks elegant in any shower or bathroom. Measuring just 14 x 12 x 9.5 cm, it takes up minimal space while offering reliable function in the kitchen, bathtub, or bathroom as a versatile metal soap holder shower

COMPATIBILITY & USE TIPS: For optimal performance, install this suction soap dish for shower on non-porous smooth surfaces like glass, tiles, stainless steel, or polished stone. Avoid porous, textured, or uneven surfaces such as grout lines, wallpaper, painted walls, wood, or natural stone to ensure strong, lasting adhesion
